title: CAU Imphal ORDINANCE 3 of 2007
text: TO BE PUBLISHED IN PART III SECTION 4 OF GAZETTE OF INDIA GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURAL.RESEARCH AND EDUCATION • CENTRAL AGRICULTURAL UNIVERSITY MANIPUR ORDINANCE Imphal dated the 176 December, 2007 No. 3 of 2007 No. CAU/Reg/584/Ord/05. - Whereas the approved Expenditure Finance Committee Memo along with addendum in respect of the sanction of the Central Agricultural University Scheme under the VtrI tl Five Year Plan as communkate-d—b—y- the Joint Secretary, Department of Agricultural Research and Education and Secretary, Indian Council of Agricultural Research vide their letter number 1(2)/92-PI and M (Part-ill) dated 13th October, 1993 provides for the establishment of College of Veterinary Sciences (Mizoram), College of Horticulture and Forestry (Arunachal' Pradesh), College of Fisheries (Tripura), College of: Agricultural Engineering and Post Harvest Technology (Sikkim), College of Home Science and College of Post Graduate Studies (Meghalaya). And whereas, the aforesaid sanction also provides for creation and filling of the Academic positions, such as the Director of Instruction, Director of Research and Director of Extension Education, Deans of the concerned Colleges and of Professors, Associate Professors and Assistant Professors and equivalent academic positions. And whereas, the Government of India in the Department of Agricultural Research and Education/Indian Council of Agricultural Research. has approved thp issue/making of an Ordinance prescribing the academic and other qualifications for the various academic and scientific positions for the Central Agricultural University vide letter No. 42(1 )/94-Edn/IV dated e August 1994. And whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section 2 of 27 of CAU Act, 1992 (No. 40 of 1992) and sub-section (I) of Section 40 of the Statutes of Central Agricultural University Act, 1992 (No. 40 of 1992), the Board of Management of Central Agricultural University approved the Mmendments regarding the experience/qualification of the post of Associate Professors/equivalent in Ordinance No. 5 of 1994. 15 -- 1 of 3 -- (e.) 14gronomy F.) 1Entomology Total 1 9 21 1 3 • Department of Human Development shall have tollow mg additional supporttinPL i) Nursery School Teacher - I ii) Creche Supervisor - I This Ordinance shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette.
